title: Modals of past deduction — multiple choice
target_form: must/can't/might/could + have + past participle for past deduction
methodology_notes: Distractors encode predictable confusions: present-time deduction, obligation, expectation. Following Cambridge MCQ writing conventions (4 options, single best answer).

exercises.rubric: Choose the option that best completes each sentence.

items.stem: I tried calling Sarah, but there was no answer. She ____ at work.

distractor_diagnostics.A: Treats the deduction as present, ignoring 'tried calling' (past).

items.explanation: 'Must have + past participle' = a confident deduction about the past.
